author: gb9t
content: Iter 96 result: net/ipv4/tcp-input.md (TCP RX core - tcp_input.c ~7767 lines largest TCP file; per-segment fast-path header-prediction + slow-path SACK + tcp_data_queue + ofo-queue + tcp_ack with clean_rtx_queue + congestion-control plug-in (Reno/CUBIC/BBR/DCTCP) + RTT estimator + F-RTO + PAWS + TFO + TCP-AO + tcp_rcv_state_process for per-state transitions) + virt/kvm/x86-debug-regs.md (DR0-7 virtualization - in x86.c ~150-200 lines; per-vCPU vcpu.arch.db[0..3] + dr6 + dr7 + eff_db[] HW + guest_debug_dr7 + DR4/DR5 alias gating on CR4.DE + DR6/DR7 reserved-bit validation + KVM_GUESTDBG_USE_HW_BP isolation + vmcs.GUEST_DR7 + vmx_sync_dirty_debug_regs). Pivoted KVM topic from svm-pmu-counters (small) to debug-regs (substantial). 142 Tier-3s total. Next iter: net/ipv4/tcp-output.md (TCP TX core) + virt/kvm/x86-tsc-deadline.md (TSC-deadline timer in LAPIC).
